narrative:
Champaign County has 26,188 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.9% of registrants.
